creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Koichiro IWAO from comment #3)
> I'd like to become a new maintainer.
> Will it be better to express becoming a maintainer in a new bug?

Yes please, referencing "bug 191848" in your description. Use "cat/port: "Take maintainership" as your summary and attach a patch (svn diff) with the changes.

And thank you for putting your hand up to maintain a port
